title: Veggie Cheese Dip
ingredients: 1 ½ cup fresh baby spinach, chopped
½ cup diced green bell pepper
2 ½ cup button mushrooms, cut into small chunks
1 cup fresh sweet corn(you may use frozen if you have to)
1 15.5oz jar of Tostitos brand reduced fat zesty cheese dip
instructions:
Heat the oil in a nonstick pan over medium high heat and add the tomatoes, pepper, onion, spinach, mushrooms and corn. Cook the vegetables for about 4 minutes.
Remove the vegetables from the pan into a heat ceramic or glass bowl. Add the cheese and the parsley and combine well. Serve in this bowl or pour into a serving. Serve while hot with chips or fresh vegetables for dipping.
